title: Create a Budget for your Research Grant — Seminar Slides (Silver, 2024 update)
display_label: Create a Budget for Your Research Grant Slides (2024-01-25)
content: PDF slide deck for the New Faculty Development Seminar 'Create a Budget for your Research Grant' presented by Gillian Silver, MPH, CPH. Original session listed on the page as 2022-11-21; this is the 2024-01-25 revised version of the slide deck. Distinct from the existing form_budget_preparation_slides (which is the longer compliance-side deck). Linked from the Pre-Award/Budget Development page as well.
